LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS ANTONIO TORREZ, CHAD SCHIMKE'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO COMPLY WITH CALIFORNIA RULE OF COURT 2.112(2). THE TITLES ASCRIBED TO THE CAUSES OF ACTIONS IN THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT EACH INCLUDES MANY DIFFERENT POSSIBLE CAUSE OF ACTIONS, SOME OF WHICH DO NOT DESCRIBE LEGAL CLAIMS, SOME OF WHICH MAY BE SUPPORTED BY THE ALLEGATIONS OF THE COMPLAINT AND SOME NOT, AND SOME OF WHICH MAY BE SUBJECT TO DIFFERENT DEFENSES OR PRIVILEGES. EACH CAUSE OF ACTION WHICH PLAINTIFF CAN LEGITIMATELY PLEAD SHOULD BE SEPERATELY STATED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS SALLY MORIN AND JAMES MILLAR'S DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT AS TO COUNTS 8, 9, 10 IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFFS TO PLEAD, IF THEY CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH, FACTS SUPPORTING THE EXCEPTION TO CIVIL CODE 1714.10 SET OUT IN ITS SUBDIVISION C AS WELL AS FACTS SUPPORTING THE OTHER ELEMENTS OF THOSE CLAIMS. SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 6 TO PLEAD ELEMENTS OF CLAIM IF PLAINTIFFS CAN DO SO. SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 7. OVERRULED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 5.
